prompt: Configure release-please for a Python monorepo with two packages: packages/core and packages/cli. We publish to PyPI. Currently both at 0.0.0, default branch is main.

assertions.name: two_packages
assertions.description: Config has entries for both packages/core and packages/cli

assertions.name: has_components
assertions.description: Each package has a component field

assertions.name: manifest_matches
assertions.description: Manifest has both package paths at 0.0.0

assertions.name: per_package_publish
assertions.description: Separate publish jobs for each package
